nodes.label: AI as research and outlining partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or overreaching creative collaborator
nodes.grounding_span: research and outlining partner - a tool for the most part

nodes.label: AI fact-checking and verification reliability
nodes.label_negative: AI inaccuracy in data extraction from visuals
nodes.grounding_span: it couldn't read it accurately. This meant I still had to spend a lot of time verifying

nodes.label: AI as cognitive flow maintainer
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of generic or unhelpful output
nodes.grounding_span: it helps keep things moving if I'm 'dreading the blank page'

nodes.label: AI creative feedback quality
nodes.label_negative: AI feedback as too zealous and generic
nodes.grounding_span: it is too zealous with what should be changed, giving feedback that is both vague and broad

nodes.label: AI adaptation to personal writing style
nodes.label_negative: AI generic voice and template-like output
nodes.grounding_span: I've carefully developed a custom instructions template and fed the project multiple articles of mine to help guide the style

nodes.label: AI impact on creative work market
nodes.grounding_span: AI is taking over these freelance positions, but I'm personally ok with that

nodes.label: AI as enhancer of creative works
nodes.label_negative: AI deadening overall voice and feeling
nodes.grounding_span: AI can be used as a tool to improve creative works

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: the time to write an article I would say is 25 to 50% faster

nodes.label: Cognitive flow and creative momentum
nodes.grounding_span: the main benefit is cognitive flow

nodes.label: Authentic personal voice and style
nodes.grounding_span: it's important to keep my voice in the writing

nodes.label: Accuracy and truthfulness
nodes.grounding_span: fact check everything I might use for the article

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI in low-end work
nodes.grounding_span: I'm personally ok with that. I'd like AI to take over a lot of work

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI creative feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I take its opinion with a grain of salt

nodes.label: Optimism about AI enhancing creativity
nodes.grounding_span: AI can be used as a tool to improve creative works

nodes.label: Concern about AI deadening voice
nodes.grounding_span: it does 'deaden' overall voice and feeling of writing throughout the web

nodes.label: Systematic multi-tool verification workflow
nodes.grounding_span: ask another (usually different AI) to fact check everything

nodes.label: Pragmatic calibration of AI reliance based on task
nodes.grounding_span: I take its opinion with a grain of salt, but it can be helpful
